entry.title: IDC HSHQDC16D00001 (P00020) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: OFFICE OF THE UNDER SECRETARY FOR MANAGEMENT

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: OFF OF THE UNDER SCTY FOR MGMT

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS REQUISITION FOR MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 4 OF THE DC1 IDIQ CONTRACT. PLEASE INCORPORATE OPTION PERIOD 4 CLINS 4100 THROUGH 4900.
TAS N/A

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: OFF OF THE UNDER SCTY FOR MGMT

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE END DATE OF DHS DATA CENTER 1, INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSHQDC-16-D-00001 FROM JULY 1, 2020 TO JUNE 30, 2021, TO ALLOW FOR CONTINUANCE OF NETWORK ACCOUNTS, DHS PERSONAL
